MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Suzanne K. Babb 7070-547-2000 of Beyers Costin Simon appearing via Zoom for plaintiff.
Jack Weaver 707-433-4842 of Welty, Weaver & Currie appearing for defendant.

Defendant contests tentative ruling. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LEONARD FADEEFF, PATRICIA FADEEFF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Triable issue of fact exist. See moving party's response to opposing party's additional facts and opposition to the separate statement.
Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with compliance CRC 3.1312(b)
